Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Luminian Order]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Luminian Order uses the White Sun crest.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Luminian Order is associated with the Unknown God.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Luminian Order and the Blackwatch are in conflict.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Jameson Allbright is the Head of the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Luminian Order is a group that performs rituals similar to what Andel witnessed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — The Luminian Order is one of the groups mobilized by the Emperor to deal with Elder activity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The Luminian Order encourages hatred of the Elders.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The Luminian Order began preaching peace after once leading humanity to war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Luminian Order has smiths trained by the Alchemist's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminian Order does not support the right of the Guilds to choose a new Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminian Order is a merciful clerical order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Many members of the Luminian Order called for Shera's immediate execution.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Luminian Order is one of the four Independent Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Luminian Order is a disciplined and organized group consisting of knights in silver and Pilgrims.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Luminian Order is supporting the Independents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Luminian Order has strict regulations on which Pilgrims can possess the full power of a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Andel is a wanted fugitive of the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Luminian Order's headquarters is in the greater Capital area.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Luminian Order is the group caring for an Elder-touched madwoman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Luminian Order is providing open security on behalf of the Independent Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The sealing boxes were created in conjunction with the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The headquarters of the Luminian Order carries an aura of peace and tranquility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli is the first of the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Luminian Order is stretched thin following the fighting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Darius Allbright helps the Luminian Order coordinate city evacuation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
